name: Korean-Style Short Ribs
recipeIngredient: 4 lb Beef short ribs, 2 1/2 inches long
recipeInstructions:
1. Score the meaty side of the ribs, opposite the bone, with cuts made 1/2 inch apart, both lengthwise and crosswise.
2. In a bowl, combine the soy sauce, water, sugar, toasted sesame seeds, Tabasco sauce, and garlic powder. Stir until the sugar has dissolved completely.
3. Place the ribs and the marinade mixture in a large plastic bag. Remove as much air from the bag as possible and seal it securely.
4. Refrigerate the bag for 2 hours, occasionally turning it to ensure even coating of the ribs.
5. After marinating, remove the ribs from the bag and place them on a broiler pan. Broil the ribs at a distance of 2 inches from the heat source for about 15 minutes, or until they are browned and crispy on all sides.
